rationale: Educ. Code §29.456 governs dispute resolution between school districts and forensic state supported living centers regarding services for alleged offender residents. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 29.456. FAILURE OF SCHOOL DISTRICT AND CENTER TO AGREE.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this education dispute-resolution provision.
